sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19241" key="balantiokle/pths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βᾰλαντῐοκλέπτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n19241.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cutpurse,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">201</biblScope> </bibl> (who condemns the form <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">βαλαντο-</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
